_doc: Single source of truth for upstream URLs + sha256 pins. Read by scripts/fetch-sources.sh and .github/workflows/upstream-watch.yml.

cx_sources._doc: CodeWeavers' LGPL Wine source drop. Published at codeweavers.com/crossover/source.

watch._doc: upstream-watch.yml scrapes this page and regex-extracts the version next to 'CROSSOVER X.Y.Z'.

gptk_redist._doc: Apple GPTK Redistributables (D3DMetal.framework + libd3dshared.dylib + License.rtf). Re-distributed by calimocho per Apple GPTK SLA section 2A(iii) + 2C — see ADR-0011 and docs/ADR/0005-bundle-gptk-d3dmetal.md.

watch._doc: upstream-watch.yml checks gcenx's GPTK packaging repo's latest release tag. gcenx repacks Apple's GPTK shortly after each Apple release, so a new gcenx tag = new Apple release. Calimocho still uses Apple's DMG directly (gcenx is the signal, not the source).

whisky._doc: Watched for un-archive (AGENTS rule #3 says if Whisky resumes active development, we reposition or archive calimocho).
whisky._not_a_build_dep: calimocho does not depend on Whisky at runtime (ADR-0008) — this entry exists only for upstream-watch.yml.
